# The K-Beauty Data Desk — full fact digest

> I read all the reviews so you don't have to. Honest, data-backed takes on Korea's best-selling skincare. One section per reviewed product; every number is Olive Young Korea's own aggregate review data. Individual reviews are never quoted.

- URL: https://seong918.github.io/beauty_blog/posts/s-nature-aqua-squalane-moisture-cream.html
